transcript: Customer: Hi, my name is Tomas Reyes, you can reach me at 555-0142. I need to upgrade my electrical panel — the breakers keep tripping when we run the dryer and the microwave together. Dispatcher: Thanks Tomas. What's the service address? Customer: 88 Birch Lane, Eugene. Dispatcher: Got it. When works for you? Customer: Sometime Friday morning would be ideal.

expected_entities.issue: Panel upgrade - breakers trip when dryer and microwave run together
